articles.title: Kawhi mum on future, 'not stressing' NBA probe
articles.original_title: Kawhi mum on future, 'not stressing' NBA probe
articles.summary: Kawhi Leonard declined to discuss his future with the Clippers after Wednesday's play-in loss and said he's "not stressing" the NBA's investigation into his deal with Aspiration.

articles.title: Vintage Curry takes over as Dubs extend season
articles.original_title: Vintage Curry takes over as Dubs extend season
articles.summary: The Warriors, led by Stephen Curry, erased a 13-point deficit in the fourth quarter to edge the Clippers and advance in the NBA's play-in tournament.

articles.title: Minus Embiid, Maxey propels Sixers into playoffs
articles.original_title: Minus Embiid, Maxey propels Sixers into playoffs
articles.summary: With Joel Embiid watching from the bench, Tyrese Maxey scored 31 points to lead the Sixers past the Magic 109-97 and lock up a first-round playoff date with the rival Boston Celtics.

articles.title: Hornets' Ball fined $35K for 'reckless' Bam play
articles.original_title: Hornets' Ball fined $35K for 'reckless' Bam play
articles.summary: The NBA has fined LaMelo Ball $35,000 "for making unnecessary and reckless contact" with Bam Adebayo during Tuesday's play-in game. The Hornets star also was fined $25,000 for using profane language during a TV interview after that game.

articles.title: Wolves ready to 'flip the switch' off uneven season
articles.original_title: Wolves ready to 'flip the switch' off uneven season
articles.summary: Coming off a rather uninspiring regular season, Anthony Edwards and the Timberwolves said "we're here now" and are ready to take on the Nuggets for the start of the playoffs.
